titleStmt.title: SII 31.81: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 81. (A.R. No. B 316 of 1937.) ŌLĒRU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Madanagōpalaśvāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Mā[r]gaśira, śu. 11, Thursday, Dhanur-lagna corresponding to December 2, Monday (not Thursday), 1538 A.D.

It registers the gift of lands such as 1 puṭṭi of land at Kōvilipāṭivāti kuṁṭa, 1 yendum on the northern side, one yendum at Paṭiguchcheḷa polamu, etc, with a stipulation to maintain the yearly marriage-festival for the god, feeding the residents and pilgrims coming from different areas for the festivals and also to maintain the worship like offerings of clothes to the deities, perpetual lamps and other offerings to the temple of Gōpinātha situated at Ōlēru by Ayyaparusayya, 12 sthanālu of Tirupati and adhikāri Yallapiḷḷaya. It is also stated that the agriculturists of the village have also donated the gift, measuring one kōrupāṭi-aḍḍa for maintaining the offerings to the god Chakrarāya. It further states the weavers (sale) community also offered five sarees for the festivals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī manmahārājādhi rājaparamēśvara
pūrvadakṣiṇapaścima Uttarasamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra A
cyutadēva mahārāyalu ppadhivīrājyamannu cēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu svasti
śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1460 Aguneṁṭi viḷaṁbi
saṁvvatsara mā¨rgaśira śu 11 gu dhanu¨rlagnamaṁddunu śrīAcyutadēvamahārā
yalu puṇyamugānu Ayyaparusayya śrītiruveṁgaḷanādhanki koṁḍḍavīṭīsīmalō
nu koṁḍavīṭi tū¨rpuṁnanu kṛṣṇatīramaṁddunu yiccina vōlēṭigrāmamaṁddunu vōlēṭīśrī
gōpinādhanki tirukōṭi tirukaḷyāṇamahōtyavānku śrītiruveṁgaḷa nādhuni Ānatini
tirupati paṁḍreṁḍḍu sdhānālavārunnu Atikāri yallappiḷlānu sama¨rppiṁccina polaṁ
kēsaripātini kha 1 . puṭṭeṁḍunnu yeṁdumuku kovilipāṭivārikuṁṭṭa tū¨rppapaṁdumunnu
Ācā Uttaramu yeṁdumunnu piṁdiraḍḍi teruvu veṁṭanu nallūri ciṭṭaḍāḷlu ve
yanu paṁdumunnu vubhayamunnu voliṁkisidipāṭini puṭṭeṁḍunnu yeṁdumaṁ (pū)
ṭṭaki paṭegucceḷla polamunu dhārāpūrvaṁgānu yistiganaka Aṁdulaṁ baṁḍḍi
na nānādhānyālunnu teccinaivēdyamunnu yāṁḍāḍiyaṁ peṁdi tirukalyāṇa mahātya
vānakunnu Ātuvā¨rlla Āragiṁppakunnu paragrāmālanuṁḍḍi vaccina dēvaḷla Āragiṁppeva
laku Uḍuga¨rllaku dēvuni paḍagalu dīpārādhanaku guḍi bhōgarāgālu medalaina saka
lavaibhavālanu sēsukoni Ācaṁdrā¨rkasdhāyigānu naḍacēdi voleṭigrāmānanu vyava
sāyaṁ cēsinavāraṁddarūnu Ubhayarāsini kōruvaḍḍi yappaḍupāri
na puṭṭakellānu kha 1 ki kōrupāṭeni Addeṁṭṭilekhanu sama¨rppiṁstimi Avinni
Avadhariṁcciṁdi cakrarāyani Āragiṁppaku kuccalacenu yistimi nagarālu
pārādhanaku camaru khaṁ . paṁdumu sālevāruyicciva cīralu 5 Ayidu Avadha
riṁccedi yīdharmaśāsanamulōnu vrāyiṁccina kṣētrālu puṭṭi A¨rththa lunu yavvaru ga
nka naḍapaka tappinānu yīkriṣṇadharini gōbrāhmaṇapadha śēsina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru .
yīśilāśāsanaṁ śrītiruveṁgaḷanādhani guḍipaṁḍreṁḍu sdhānālavāri muṁdaṭanu
pālarāmānujiyyaṁgārunnu mērakaraṇaṁ śrīnivāsayyānu nallaṁdaccinnivrāyi
ṁccina śilāśāsanaṁ . yidi śrītiruveṁgaḷanādhani pādarakṣa . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattā paharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
Ēkēva bhaginilōkē sa¨rvēṣāmēvabhūbhujāṁ nabhōjyā nakaragrāṁhya vipradattā
vasuṁdharā . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōhārēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ . volēṭi śrīgōpinādhaniki vēlūri peddā
reḍḍigāru cilukarāvicēni vuttaralukka tippa sama¨rppistimi .
Digital edition of SII 31.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
